backend/main.mo: Main actor for the ICP backend implementing CRUD operations for pages, posts, and user profiles with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Stub migration module that runs on canister upgrade, currently returning the old actor state unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (Pages section, Posts section, backend wiring) to their associated source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled '10th Science Academy' that mounts the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component providing view-based navigation between home, pages, and posts views with a sticky header, mobile menu, and all home-page content sections.
frontend/src/components/PageForm.tsx: Controlled form component for creating or editing a page, using useCreatePage/useUpdatePage hooks with loading, error, and success feedback states.
frontend/src/components/PagesList.tsx: Renders a list of pages as cards with edit and delete actions, showing an edit dialog with PageForm for owners and a confirmation dialog before deletion.
frontend/src/components/PostForm.tsx: A form component for creating or updating a post with title and body fields, handling submission via useCreatePost/useUpdatePost mutations and displaying success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/PostsList.tsx: Renders a list of posts as cards with edit and delete actions for owners, using PostForm in a dialog for editing and an AlertDialog for delete confirmation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/usePages.ts: Exports React Query hooks (useGetAllPages, useCreatePage, useUpdatePage, useDeletePage) for fetching and mutating pages via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/usePosts.ts: Exports React Query hooks (useGetAllPosts, useCreatePost, useUpdatePost, useDeletePost) for fetching and mutating posts via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfiles.ts: Exports useGetCallerUserProfile and useGetUserProfile hooks that fetch the current or a specific user's profile from the backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Merriweather, Inter), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system (colors, radius, sidebar) in both light and dark modes using OKLCH color values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/PagesPage.tsx: Page component for the Pages section that shows a header with a 'New Page' button (or login prompt for unauthenticated users), renders PagesList, and opens a PageForm dialog for creating new pages.
frontend/src/pages/PostsPage.tsx: Page component for the Posts section that shows a header with a 'New Post' button (or login prompt for unauthenticated users), renders PostsList, and opens a PostForm dialog for creating new posts.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive parameters from the URL hash without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the theme with OKLCH-based CSS variable colors, Merriweather/Inter font families, custom border radii, box shadows, and accordion/fade-in keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the app's existing features (Pages/Posts frontend sections and backend wiring) and pending feature requests (backend CRUD APIs for pages and posts) for the '10th Science Academy' web application.
